name: The King's Gambit Accepted as Black
description: A Black repertoire for the King's Gambit Accepted, drilled one position at a time: every card is a position with exactly one book move to find. Built from 3,000,000 rated games (Lichess database 2026-06, ratings 1600-2200): opponent replies branch by how often they are actually played, covering the most common 90% at each turn, so frequent lines run deep and rare sidelines stay shallow. 22 positions.
